case_title: GEORGE SEFERGLOU VS. RON YOUNG DBA YOUNG LABORATORIES

docket_entries.description: STIPULATION FOR HEARING BEFORE JUDGE PRO TEM ELIZABETH RILES FILED BY SEFERGLOU, GEORGE RON YOUNG DBA YOUNG LABORATORIES
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT RON YOUNG DBA YOUNG LABORATORIES

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SEFERGLOU, GEORGE RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT RON YOUNG DBA YOUNG LABORATORIES $180.00 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $180.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $3,500.00 FILED BY SEFERGLOU, GEORGE AS TO DEFENDANT RON YOUNG DBA YOUNG LABORATORIES ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUL-13-2010 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUL-13-2010 - JUDGMENT.
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT RON YOUNG DBA YOUNG LABORATORIES

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JUL-13-2010 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JUL-13-2010 BY JUDGE PRO TEM: ELIZABETH RILES. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT. PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT EXHIBITS RETAINED. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED JUL-01-2011 ORDERED DESTROYED
